description: PMP-WD (Theorem 3) is derived but completely unvalidated. The paper's primary positive algorithmic contribution -- a state-feedback WD controller from the stochastic Pontryagin Maximum Principle with an independent RG beta function derivation -- has zero experimental evaluation. Section 1.2 explicitly states 'PMP-WD is a theoretical contribution; empirical evaluation is deferred to future work.'
suggestion: Implement PMP-WD and run it on at least ResNet-20 CIFAR-10 under AdamW at rho-standard (rho=0.5) and rho-high (rho=5.0), 3 seeds each. Estimated cost: ~2 GPU-hours.

description: The rho-high regime (rho=5.0) remains at the 5-epoch pilot stage. Theorem 1's most interesting prediction -- method sensitivity increases at elevated rho -- is entirely untested at the extreme. The 'differentiation' zone in Figure 1 is unsupported by data.
suggestion: Run rho-high with stabilization (warmup, gradient clipping) or try rho=2.0 as an intermediate point. 3 methods x 3 seeds = 9 runs.

description: Statistical power at N=3 seeds is insufficient for a null-result paper. TOST at delta=0.5% has only 15-20% power. The central equivalence claim lacks formal statistical support.
suggestion: Add 2 seeds (N=5) for 4 key methods on CIFAR-10 AdamW for ResNet-20 and VGG-16-BN. 16 additional runs, ~4 GPU-hours.

description: Paper underreports available data: rho-low CWD shows 3 completed seeds in raw data but paper claims '1 seed'. NoBN has 3 methods partially complete but paper claims '2 methods'. Table 6 and Section 5.3 are stale.
suggestion: Update all sections to reflect current data. rho-low Phi spread is 0.18% (2 methods, 3 seeds each), not '>= 0.04%'.

description: Abstract claims '105 completed 200-epoch runs' but cross-validated count is 122. The paper underreports its own evidence.
suggestion: Update the abstract to the accurate count of 122 completed runs.

description: SGD rho confound unresolved. Matched-rho SGD has only 2 seeds for constant and 1 for CWD. The 3.7x spread ratio used as headline finding is a mixed-effects confound.
suggestion: Complete matched-rho SGD: add CWD seeds 123/456 and no_wd for 3 seeds. 5 additional runs.

description: CWD phi formula uses u_t (preconditioned update) but framework definition uses g_t (raw gradient). The distinction matters for Adam's normalization.
suggestion: Define u_t explicitly in Section 3.1 and clarify which CWD uses.

description: CSI weights (0.4, 0.3, 0.3) unjustified. Referenced Appendix A.3 does not exist. CSI has no within-architecture predictive value.
suggestion: Add Appendix A.3 or remove reference. Consider demoting CSI to a secondary metric.

description: CIFAR-100 SGD results referenced in text (Phi spread = 1.71%) but no dedicated statistical analysis table provided.
suggestion: Add CIFAR-100 SGD statistical analysis paragraph with p-values and effect sizes.
